text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Bey Herrn Johannes Christ seel. Frau Wittib ist zu haben: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann Arnds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Paßions- und Oster-Predigten</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> ß <PRIZE>fl. 2.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Predigten von denen Egyptischen Plagen</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> ß <PRIZE>24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stahlii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Fundamenta Chymiae dogmat. rat. & experim.</TITLE> <VOLUME>Pars II.</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>fl. 1. 30. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Poetevin</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Nouvelle Grammaire Francoise & Allemande</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> ß <PRIZE>32. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maiers der Geistl.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Krancken Geistl. oder Seelen-Cur.</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> ß <PRIZE>48. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Hauß-Gebett-Buch, mit grober Schrifft</TITLE>, <VOLUME>2. Theile</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> ß <PRIZE>40. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":4,"explanation":"1) Replaced the ampersand-escape artifacts (√ü → ß, √† → ß) which are OCR/encoding errors for the long-s/ß and Kreuzer symbol. 2) Fixed the XML tag error where <PRICE>...</PRIZE> had mismatched opening/closing tags — changed to <PRIZE>...</PRIZE> for consistency with the rest of the document. 3) Corrected obvious OCR typos: \"Stahiii\" → \"Stahlii\" and \"Nouvelie\" → \"Nouvelle\". 4) Replaced escaped unicode sequences (\\u221a\\u00fc etc.) with the intended character ß (and Hauß, Paßions)."}

parsed.explanation: 1) Replaced the ampersand-escape artifacts (√ü → ß, √† → ß) which are OCR/encoding errors for the long-s/ß and Kreuzer symbol. 2) Fixed the XML tag error where <PRICE>...</PRIZE> had mismatched opening/closing tags — changed to <PRIZE>...</PRIZE> for consistency with the rest of the document. 3) Corrected obvious OCR typos: "Stahiii" → "Stahlii" and "Nouvelie" → "Nouvelle". 4) Replaced escaped unicode sequences (\u221a\u00fc etc.) with the intended character ß (and Hauß, Paßions).
